node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Find the smallest prime p such that there exists an integer n satisfying n^4 + 1 ≡ 0 (mod p^2). Once p is found, find the smallest positive integer m such that m^4 + 1 ≡ 0 (mod p^2).

Then find least m where m^4 + 1 = 0 (mod p^2).

Exact numerical match.
